summary: LiteLLM is an abstraction layer supporting multiple large language model backends including OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Gemini, Groq, HuggingFace, OpenRouter, Mistral, and custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints. It is used by AutoAgent to f...
